The '''''Indomitable''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==History==
It was constructed at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] shipyards on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. [[Shannon Voorson]] was able to slice its name along with several other Star Destroyer names and gave it to her cousin, [[Deen Voorson]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
